SELECT P1.Title, P1.JournalId, P1.ConferenceId, P1.Keyword FROM Paper AS P1 WHERE P1.Keyword = 'user' UNION ALL SELECT P2.Title, P2.JournalId, P2.ConferenceId, P2.Keyword FROM Paper AS P2 WHERE P2.Year < 318 ORDER BY Title
SELECT C1.HomePage, C1.FullName, C1.Id FROM Conference AS C1 WHERE C1.HomePage = 'admin' UNION SELECT C2.HomePage, C2.FullName, C2.Id FROM Conference AS C2 WHERE C2.Id < 860
SELECT A1.Affiliation, A1.Id, A1.Name FROM Author AS A1 WHERE A1.Name LIKE '%c' UNION SELECT A2.Affiliation, A2.Id, A2.Name FROM Author AS A2 WHERE A2.Affiliation LIKE '%c' ORDER BY Affiliation
SELECT P1.AuthorId, P1.PaperId, P1.Affiliation FROM PaperAuthor AS P1 WHERE P1.AuthorId >= 90 UNION SELECT P2.AuthorId, P2.PaperId, P2.Affiliation FROM PaperAuthor AS P2 WHERE P2.AuthorId = 697
SELECT J1.FullName, J1.ShortName FROM Journal AS J1 WHERE J1.ShortName LIKE 'b%' UNION ALL SELECT J2.FullName, J2.ShortName FROM Journal AS J2 WHERE J2.ShortName <> '123'
SELECT J1.Id, J1.HomePage FROM Journal AS J1 WHERE J1.ShortName <> 'admin' UNION SELECT J2.Id, J2.HomePage FROM Journal AS J2 WHERE J2.HomePage = 'test' LIMIT 17
SELECT A1.Affiliation, A1.Id, A1.Name FROM Author AS A1 WHERE A1.Id > 872 UNION SELECT A2.Affiliation, A2.Id, A2.Name FROM Author AS A2 WHERE A2.Name <> 'admin'

SELECT P1.AuthorId, P1.Name, P1.PaperId, P1.Affiliation FROM PaperAuthor AS P1 WHERE P1.Affiliation <> 'admin' UNION SELECT P2.AuthorId, P2.Name, P2.PaperId, P2.Affiliation FROM PaperAuthor AS P2 WHERE P2.Name LIKE 'b%' ORDER BY AuthorId
SELECT C1.FullName, C1.ShortName FROM Conference AS C1 WHERE C1.FullName LIKE 'b%' UNION SELECT C2.FullName, C2.ShortName FROM Conference AS C2 WHERE C2.HomePage = 'activity'
SELECT J1.HomePage, J1.ShortName FROM Journal AS J1 WHERE J1.HomePage LIKE '%a%' UNION SELECT J2.HomePage, J2.ShortName FROM Journal AS J2 WHERE J2.FullName <> 'user'
SELECT J1.ShortName, J1.FullName, J1.HomePage FROM Journal AS J1 WHERE J1.Id < 467 UNION SELECT J2.ShortName, J2.FullName, J2.HomePage FROM Journal AS J2 WHERE J2.Id <> 444
SELECT J1.HomePage, J1.FullName FROM Journal AS J1 WHERE J1.HomePage LIKE 'b%' UNION SELECT J2.HomePage, J2.FullName FROM Journal AS J2 WHERE J2.HomePage LIKE '%c'

SELECT C1.HomePage, C1.ShortName, C1.FullName, C1.Id FROM Conference AS C1 WHERE C1.FullName LIKE '%a%' UNION ALL SELECT C2.HomePage, C2.ShortName, C2.FullName, C2.Id FROM Conference AS C2 WHERE C2.FullName LIKE 'b%'

SELECT J1.FullName, J1.HomePage, J1.ShortName, J1.Id FROM Journal AS J1 WHERE J1.FullName <> 'test' UNION ALL SELECT J2.FullName, J2.HomePage, J2.ShortName, J2.Id FROM Journal AS J2 WHERE J2.FullName = 'activity'
SELECT P1.Name, P1.Affiliation FROM PaperAuthor AS P1 WHERE P1.PaperId = 600 UNION ALL SELECT P2.Name, P2.Affiliation FROM PaperAuthor AS P2 WHERE P2.Affiliation <> 'admin'

SELECT P1.PaperId, P1.Name, P1.Affiliation, P1.AuthorId FROM PaperAuthor AS P1 WHERE P1.AuthorId > 408 UNION SELECT P2.PaperId, P2.Name, P2.Affiliation, P2.AuthorId FROM PaperAuthor AS P2 WHERE P2.PaperId >= 167
